title.en: One by one, the primary-level immeasurable life...

content.en:
However, the strength of the three to the fortified level of Akagi and the others is limited, and although the immeasurable lifeforms besieging them are all beginner-level, they are numerous!

But Akagi and the others knew very well that if they didn't work hard, when the middle-level immeasurable lifeforms of the True Mountain Territory arrived, they would desperately not want to leave.

In an instant, Akagi and the others used their hole cards and escaped at all costs.

Thundered!!!!

Their battle spilled over into the surrounding realms, attracting the attention of more immeasurable lifeforms.

In an instant, Akagi successfully escaped from the encirclement at the cost of heavy damage, and some immeasurable lifeforms were still chasing and killing, but Akagi soon came to the crack that cut off the black mountain, and escaped directly into the crack, leaving the real mountain territory.

But the other two who reached the fortification level didn't have such good luck, and they couldn't escape at all.

Abrupt.

A mid-level immeasurable lifeform descended here, and directly attacked, killing two supreme enhancement level.

"Golden Glass Great Ancestor!"

"Golden Glass Great Ancestor!"

"Golden Glass Great Ancestor!"

One by one, the primary-level immeasurable lifeforms said respectfully.

The Golden Glass Ancestor nodded slightly, and then came to the crack that cut off the forbidden area.

He tried to reach a hand over, but found a force holding him back, making it impossible for him to leave.

"From the heaven and earth outside the Xuanqi Territory, and it should be weaker than our Xuanqi Territory, otherwise I should be able to pass!"

Jinli Ancestor said.

"Golden Glass Ancestor, what should I do now?"

A primary-level immeasurable lifeform asked.

"Don't worry, it's just a weak world, I thought it was an intruder before. Now that we know why, there's no need to worry!"

The Golden Glass Ancestor left directly, too lazy to pay attention to this little matter.

In the Genki Territory, there are many territories that are connected to the outside world, as well as some intersections and so on.

For this situation, the Xuanqi Realm is all ignored.

After all, if there is a crack, and a group of immeasurable lifeforms are sent to garrison it, then there are no immeasurable lifeforms willing to do it.

After all, this situation can't threaten the Xuanqi Territory at all, and it doesn't do any good.

There are even some forces that are willing to recruit immeasurable life forms from the outside world, and they don't object to it at all.

Therefore, he is too lazy to care about this kind of thing.

Subsequently, other immeasurable lifeforms also left.

But if there are immeasurable life forms from outside to cause trouble here, they will still take action.

......

Cut off the exclusion zone.

Akagi came back and immediately went to heal.

And the news of Akagi's return naturally couldn't hide it from Ye Tian, and Ye Tian soon knew the news of the fall of the two supreme strengtheners.

"I didn't expect two supreme fortifiers to fall!"

Ye Tian muttered.

This time, the side of the forbidden area suffered a heavy loss!

However, it has nothing to do with him.

Soon after, news of this rift also spread.

But after Ye Tian shared the information with the other Supreme Ninefold Ancestors in the Nine-Fold Building, those Supreme Ninefold Ancestors didn't want to enter the True Mountain Territory because the danger was too great!

So, they were still in retreat and they weren't involved in it.

The same is true for the other forces, seeing that the two Supreme Strengtheners have fallen, coupled with the particularity of the True Mountain Territory, they don't dare to send Dao Ancestors in.

The various races of the Panshan Territory occupy a territory, and there is little cooperation between them to snatch resources.

But with this kind of pattern, if they dare to snatch it, it will be troublesome.

Moreover, the True Mountain Collar is even more powerful, and it also has a number of mid-level immeasurable lifeforms, so they don't dare to provoke them.

At this critical moment, if too many Supreme Ninefold Ancestors were lost, then the situation of the major forces in the Silent Black Sea would be in danger.

Therefore, only Ye Tian really infiltrated the True Mountain Territory alone.

......

The years passed.

Ye Tian has settled in the True Mountain Territory as a True Clan, and his current identity is the Ninth-Order Dao Ancestor of the True Mountain Territory-Xuan Ming!

Now, he already knew that the major territories of the Xuanqi Realm divided the Dao Ancestor realm before the Supreme Ninefold Origin Ancestor into nine orders, which was different from the division of the Silent Black Sea.

Among them, the Ninefold Origin Ancestor is called the Eighth-Order Dao Ancestor here, and the Nine-Order Dao Ancestor is equivalent to the strength of the second rank of the Ninefold Origin Ancestor.

The division of realms is different, mainly because there are differences in the cultivation system.

But when it comes to the Supreme Ninefold Origin Ancestor realm, the cultivation system is not much different.

Here, the Supreme Ninefold Ancestor is not called this, nor is it called the Supreme Enhancement Level, but is called the Immeasurable Great Ancestor.

Both the primary-level immeasurable lifeforms and the middle-level immeasurable lifeforms are called the Immeasurable Great Ancestor, and as for the high-level immeasurable lifeforms, the True Mountain Territory does not have such an existence.

According to Ye Tian's understanding, there were a total of eighteen middle-level immeasurable lifeforms and thousands of primary-level immeasurable lifeforms in the True Mountain Territory.

There are also some immeasurable lifeforms that have gone to other territories to seek further development.

Otherwise, there would be more immeasurable lifeforms in the True Mountain Territory.

"Just one True Mountain Territory is enough to sweep across the Silent Black Sea, not to mention that the True Mountain Territory is just one of the many territories in the Xuanqi Territory. The strength of the Xuanqi Realm is too terrifying, far beyond the Silent Black Sea!"

Ye Tian muttered.

However, it is precisely because the Xuanqi Territory is so powerful that it will have more opportunities.

In the following days, Ye Tian began to boil this body well, and then after a period of time, he began to attack the primary-level immeasurable life form.

The potential of this body was very great, and coupled with the immeasurable ancestral endowment given by Ye Tian, it was easy to break through and succeed.

"This True Race Replica Body has also broken through to become a primary-level immeasurable life form, and it is also a top powerhouse among the True Mountain Realm. Next, we have to use this replica body to obtain resources from the True Mountain Territory!"

Ye Tian muttered.

Fortunately, the body he copied came from the Zhen Clan, and the Zhen Clan was very powerful in the True Mountain Territory and was the number one clan, so this identity was still good.

After breaking through to become a primary-level immeasurable lifeform, the name of Xuan Ming began to spread throughout the True Mountain Territory.

And Ye Tian also tried to make friends with an immeasurable ancestor, so that he could hope to get more opportunities!

this day.

Ye Tian learned something that surprised him incomparably, that is, the immeasurable body!

The immeasurable lifeforms of the Xuanqi Realm have created a variety of immeasurable body secret techniques, which can be cultivated into an incomparably powerful immeasurable body.

Of course.

The Infinite Body Secret Technique is very precious, many Beginner Infinite Life Forms do not have this Secret Technique, and only a few Beginner Infinite Life Forms have this kind of Secret Technique.

Of course, even if you acquire a secret technique, it is difficult to practice it.

But once it is practiced, the combat power will crush the same level, and even the top primary-level immeasurable lifeforms will defeat the average middle-level immeasurable lifeforms.

"You must obtain this immeasurable body secret technique!"

Ye Tian said darkly.
